title: What it actually looks like to want a wife and not chase one
caption:
The man who stopped chasing her is the one she can't stop thinking about.

When getting a wife is the goal, it changes everything you do and say in ways you can't fully control. You end up performing — and she can feel the performance even when she can't name it.

The work is not finding her. The work is becoming a man with the kind of direction, character, and fear of God that makes him worth walking beside.

Character is visible. Direction is visible. She can see both — and she can smell their absence.

"He who finds a wife finds a good thing." — Proverbs 18:22. The word is *finds*. Not chases down. Not performs for.

Save this. Come back to the question on the last slide.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #proverbs #relationships #discipleship #christianity #mensministry #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
